en: In the days of Amraphel king of Shinar, Arioch king of Ellasar, Chedorlaomer king of Elam, and Tidal king of Goiim,
zh: 當暗拉非作示拿王，亞略作以拉撒王，基大老瑪作以攔王，提達作戈印王的時候，

en: these kings made war with Bera king of Sodom, Birsha king of Gomorrah, Shinab king of Admah, Shemeber king of Zeboiim, and the king of Bela (that is, Zoar).
zh: 他們興兵攻打所多瑪王比拉、蛾摩拉王比沙、押瑪王示納、洗扁王善以別和比拉王。比拉就是瑣珥。

en: And all these joined forces in the Valley of Siddim (that is, the Salt Sea).
zh: 這五王在西訂谷會合。西訂谷就是鹽海。

en: Twelve years they had served Chedorlaomer, but in the thirteenth year they rebelled.
zh: 他們服事了基大老瑪已經有十二年，到第十三年就背叛了。

en: In the fourteenth year Chedorlaomer and the kings who were with him came and defeated the Rephaim in Ashteroth-karnaim, the Zuzim in Ham, the Emim in Shaveh-kiriathaim,
zh: 第十四年基大老瑪和同盟的王都來了，在亞特律．加寧擊敗了利乏音人，在哈麥擊敗了蘇西人，在沙微．基列亭擊敗了以米人，

en: and the Horites in their hill country of Seir as far as El-paran on the border of the wilderness.
zh: 在何利人的西珥山擊敗了何利人，一直追擊到靠近曠野的伊勒．巴蘭。

en: Then they turned back and came to En-mishpat (that is, Kadesh) and defeated all the country of the Amalekites, and also the Amorites who were dwelling in Hazazon-tamar.
zh: 然後轉到安．密巴，就是加低斯，攻佔了亞瑪力人全部的領土，也擊敗了住在哈洗遜．他瑪的亞摩利人。

en: Then the king of Sodom, the king of Gomorrah, the king of Admah, the king of Zeboiim, and the king of Bela (that is, Zoar) went out, and they joined battle in the Valley of Siddim
zh: 於是所多瑪王、蛾摩拉王、押瑪王、洗扁王和比拉王 都出來，在西訂谷列陣，與他們交戰；

en: with Chedorlaomer king of Elam, Tidal king of Goiim, Amraphel king of Shinar, and Arioch king of Ellasar, four kings against five.
zh: 就是與以攔王基大老瑪、戈印王提達、示拿王暗拉非、以拉撒王亞略交戰，就是四王與五王交戰。

en: Now the Valley of Siddim was full of bitumen pits, and as the kings of Sodom and Gomorrah fled, some fell into them, and the rest fled to the hill country.
zh: 西訂谷有許多漆坑。所多瑪王和蛾摩拉王逃跑的時候，都掉在坑裡，其餘的人都向著山上逃跑。

en: So the enemy took all the possessions of Sodom and Gomorrah, and all their provisions, and went their way.
zh: 四王就把所多瑪和蛾摩拉所有的財物，以及一切糧食都拿走，

en: They also took Lot, the son of Abram's brother, who was dwelling in Sodom, and his possessions, and went their way.
zh: 連亞伯蘭的姪兒羅得和羅得的財物也帶走了。當時，羅得住在所多瑪。

en: Then one who had escaped came and told Abram the Hebrew, who was living by the oaks of Mamre the Amorite, brother of Eshcol and of Aner. These were allies of Abram.
zh: 有一個逃出來的人，跑來告訴希伯來人亞伯蘭。那時，亞伯蘭住在亞摩利人幔利的橡樹那裡。幔利和以實各，以及亞乃，都是兄弟；他們都是亞伯蘭的盟友。

en: When Abram heard that his kinsman had been taken captive, he led forth his trained men, born in his house, 318 of them, and went in pursuit as far as Dan.
zh: 亞伯蘭一聽見姪兒被人擄去，就抽調他家裡生養的精練壯丁三百一十八人，一直追到但。

en: And he divided his forces against them by night, he and his servants, and defeated them and pursued them to Hobah, north of Damascus.
zh: 亞伯蘭和他的僕人趁夜分隊攻擊他們，結果擊敗了他們，又追趕他們直到大馬士革北面的何把，

en: Then he brought back all the possessions, and also brought back his kinsman Lot with his possessions, and the women and the people.
zh: 將一切財物都奪回來，也把他的姪兒羅得和羅得的財物，以及婦女和族人，都奪了回來。

en: After his return from the defeat of Chedorlaomer and the kings who were with him, the king of Sodom went out to meet him at the Valley of Shaveh (that is, the King's Valley).
zh: 亞伯蘭擊敗了基大老瑪和與他聯盟的王回來的時候，所多瑪王出來，在沙微谷迎接他。沙微谷就是帝王谷。

en: And Melchizedek king of Salem brought out bread and wine. (He was priest of God Most High.)
zh: 撒冷王麥基洗德也帶著餅和酒出來；他是至高 神的祭司。

en: And he blessed him and said, "Blessed be Abram by God Most High, Possessor of heaven and earth;
zh: 他給亞伯蘭祝福，說： “願創造天地的主、至高的 神， 賜福給亞伯蘭。

en: and blessed be God Most High, who has delivered your enemies into your hand!" And Abram gave him a tenth of everything.
zh: 把敵人交在你手裡的至高的 神，是應當稱頌的！” 亞伯蘭就把所得的一切，拿出十分之一來，給了麥基洗德。

en: And the king of Sodom said to Abram, "Give me the persons, but take the goods for yourself."
zh: 所多瑪王對亞伯蘭說：“請你把人交給我，至於財物，你拿去吧。”

en: But Abram said to the king of Sodom, "I have lifted my hand to the LORD, God Most High, Possessor of heaven and earth,
zh: 亞伯蘭對所多瑪王說：“我已經向創造天地的主、至高的 神耶和華舉手起誓；

en: that I would not take a thread or a sandal strap or anything that is yours, lest you should say, 'I have made Abram rich.'
zh: 凡是你的東西，就是一根線，一條鞋帶，我也不拿，免得你說：‘我使亞伯蘭發了財。’

en: I will take nothing but what the young men have eaten, and the share of the men who went with me. Let Aner, Eshcol, and Mamre take their share."
zh: 我甚麼都不要，除了僕人吃掉的以外，但與我同行的亞乃、以實各、幔利所應得的分，讓他們拿去吧。”
